title: Paddington Bear — deep clean and restuff
description: Paddington arrived tired and dusty. We deep cleaned the plush and restuffed so the bear holds his classic shape again.
itemDetails: Paddington Bear plush is licensed from Michael Bond's character first published in 1958, with long-running toy production by multiple official licensees such as Eden, Rainbow Designs, and others by region/era. Signature identifiers include duffle coat, hat, and often the marmalade tag motif. Materials are typically polyester plush or mixed textile construction with dressed clothing components and embroidered facial features.
repairDetails: This Paddington Bear needed a full plush refresh. We deep cleaned the fabric and restuffed the body so Paddington sits upright with even filling. Workshop photos document the plush before and after the restuff.
